title: sarothamnus vulgaris
intro: Sarothamnus vulgaris, also known as the common broom or broom spurrey, is a flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. It is native to Europe and Western Asia, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Sarothamnus vulgaris include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health issues. Sarothamnus vulgaris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in folk medicine to treat various conditions.
